code: export const formatDateVN=dateString=>{if(!dateString)return"";const date=new Date(dateString);if(isNaN(date))return dateString;return date.toLocaleDateString("vi-VN");};export const formatTimeVN=timeString=>{if(!timeString)return"";return String(timeString).slice(0,5);};export const formatDateTimeVN=dateTimeString=>{if(!dateTimeString)return"";const date=new Date(dateTimeString);if(isNaN(date))return dateTimeString;const ngay=date.toLocaleDateString("vi-VN");const gio=date.toLocaleTimeString("vi-VN",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit",hour12:false});return`${ngay} ${gio}`;};
